title: grewia cyclopetala
intro: Grewia cyclopetala, also known as the 'Five-angled Fruiting Grewia', is a plant species in the family Malvaceae, native to India. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant is said to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and aiding in digestion. The herbal preparations of Grewia cyclopetala include infusions, decoctions, and extracts, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions.
